sensitivity.note: Defense/ME employers: keep real names. Generic corporate: use sanitized versions. Always ask user.

jd.title: Senior Avionics Maintenance Manager

requirements.text: 12+ years experience in military or commercial avionics maintenance and sustainment
Demonstrated experience managing aircraft maintenance operations for multi-aircraft fleets (5+ aircraft)
Hands-on experience with AEW&C, ISR, or surveillance aircraft avionics and mission systems
Experience supervising and mentoring maintenance engineering teams (10+ personnel)
Knowledge of short-range air defense (SHORAD) or ground-based weapons systems maintenance
MS or higher in Avionics, Electrical, Aerospace, or Systems Engineering
Proficiency in maintenance planning, scheduling, and fleet availability KPI management
Experience coordinating with international OEMs for spares, technical data, and field support
Knowledge of military airworthiness standards and compliance documentation (MIL-STD, EASA Part-145 or equivalent)
Familiarity with IETM/IETP electronic technical manuals or AMOS/SAP maintenance management systems
PMP, PMI-ACP, or equivalent project management certification

responsibilities: Lead all avionics maintenance operations for a fleet of surveillance/AEW aircraft ensuring mission readiness targets
Develop and manage preventive/corrective maintenance schedules, including deep maintenance staggering plans
Coordinate with OEM field service representatives for technical support, warranty claims, and spare parts provisioning
Track and report fleet readiness metrics (Mission Capable Rate, Aircraft Availability) to program leadership
Develop maintenance training programs and competency assessments for avionics engineering staff
Ensure compliance with airworthiness directives, service bulletins, and safety standards
Manage maintenance documentation, configuration records, and technical library systems
Support fleet modification and upgrade programs in coordination with engineering teams

expected_output.summary: Senior Avionics & Maintenance professional with 16+ years of Pakistan Air Force experience managing maintenance operations for SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C and JF-17 Thunder aircraft. Proven track record in fleet readiness management, field engineering command, and international OEM coordination with SAAB (Sweden) and CADI (China). MS Avionics Engineering with hands-on expertise across radar systems, air defense weapons, and aircraft modification programs.

experience.title: Maintenance Support Engineer, AEW&C Aircraft
bullets: Managed maintenance engineering for SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet (9 aircraft) including radar, mission systems, and airframe
Ensured operational readiness through maintenance scheduling, staggering, and resource allocation for multi-aircraft fleet
Performed technical fault diagnosis and coordinated component repair/replacement activities
Led maintenance teams for field operations, ensuring aircraft availability for surveillance missions

experience.title: Senior Engineering Officer, Crotale Weapons System
bullets: Commanded engineering operations for Crotale short-range air defense weapons system
Managed operational readiness of SAM battery including launcher, radar, fire control, and missile systems
Led field maintenance teams responsible for weapons system availability during operational deployments
Coordinated maintenance staggering and resource allocation across multiple system components

experience.title: PMO Officer, AEW&C Aircraft
bullets: Managed program activities for SAAB 2000 Erieye AEW&C fleet sustainment (9 aircraft)
Coordinated maintenance contracts, spare parts logistics, and system upgrade programs with SAAB (Sweden)
Tracked fleet availability metrics and mission readiness reporting

experience.title: Integrated Systems & Design Specialist
bullets: Designed and integrated avionics subsystems for military aircraft platforms
Performed system-level testing, verification, and validation of integrated avionics suites
Supported production line engineering for avionics installation and wiring harness integration

certifications: Engineering Project Management Specialization — Rice University
education: BE Avionics Engineering — College of Aeronautical Engineering, PAF (2004-2008)

provenance.notes: Real user career data. JDs modeled from real defense/aerospace postings. User snap-checked during creation session. Expected outputs derived from verified ground truth profile.
